title: Ubiquiti G6 Pro Turret, UniFi 8MP IP camera, black
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP cameras / Turret
description: Ubiquiti UniFi IP turret hybrid camera UVC-G6-Pro-Turret-B features an 8MP sensor (3840 x 2160 px) at 30fps, a varifocal lens (5.85mm-13.8mm), combined IR/white light illumination for night vision up to 40m, IP66 and IK4 protection and built-in microphones. The camera connects to the network via 1Gbit LAN with PoE+ support and a maximum power consumption of 15W 8MP 30fps video (3840 x 2160 px) Advanced AI detection - reduces false alarms and reliably detects people and vehicles Hybrid Smart illumination - IR/LED lighting up to 40m Supports local recording to a microSD card or NAS Managed via UniFi Protect IP66 weatherproof housing IK4 vandal resistance Powered via 802.3at 42.5-57V PoE+ Device Screws, wall plugs, tools Wall/ceiling mount
